name: BLACK WIDOW
description: Natasha Romanova is the world's most elite spy in any era. Her mastery of the sniper rifle eliminates targets from afar, while her shock batons neutralize close-range threats. Black Widow is locked, loaded, and ready to deliver a fatal bite!
lore: Trained from childhood in the infamous Red Room, Natasha Romanova became one of the most feared spies and saboteurs in the world. For years, she put her unrivaled combat skills to use as a member of the Avengers, keeping pace with some of the most powerful beings who ever lived. Imbued with supersoldier-like treatments that vastly extended her lifespan, Black Widow outlived most of her enemies and allies. But her fight still rages on decades into the future, where she leads the Red Room in its ongoing effort to overthrow the tyrannical Doom 2099.

abilities.name: Widow's Bite Baton
abilities.description: Strike with the enhanced electric batons

abilities.name: Red Room Rifle
abilities.description: Attack with the Red Room Rifle

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 10m, decreasing to 50% at 20m
stats.Special Effect: Shares the same magazine with Red Room Rifle. Straight Shooter activates only after aiming down sights for a specific duration; otherwise, it will fire from the Red Room Rifle

abilities.name: ASSASSIN'S FOCUS
abilities.description: Switch the Red Room Rifle to sniper mode. Shots fired in this state pierce through targets and deal increased damage

abilities.name: ELECTRO-PLASMA BLAST
abilities.description: Fire an electro-plasma round forward. Upon hitting the environment or an enemy, it explodes and applies a Slow effect

abilities.name: EDGE DANCER
abilities.description: Unleash a spinning kick to Launch Up enemies. Landing the hit will allow her to zip to the target with a grappling hook for a second kick

abilities.name: WIDOW'S BITE SLAM
abilities.description: Leap toward a target area and slam the ground with her Widow's Bite gauntlet, dealing damage to enemies within range

base.description: Landing hits with Red Room Rifle builds Focus. At three stacks, enter a Focused state where the next bullet gains the Hunter's Sight effect, granting Damage Boost and pierce effects.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hawkeye, landing a critical hit prevents the Focused state from expiring, allowing continuous enhanced fire until missing a crit.

stats.Special Effect: Landing a critical hit prevents the Focused state from expiring, allowing continuous enhanced fire until missing a crit.

base.description: Activation grants the Red Room Rifle a Fire Rate Boost. Additionally, the Plasma Cannon projectile becomes a hitscan laser that no longer requires charging.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Phoenix, her Plasma Cannon gains a second ability charge.
